title: Policies for information security
text: Information security policy and topic-specific policies should be defined, approved by management, published, and communicated to relevant parties.

meta.note: Seed summary snippet for demo; replace with licensed authoritative text where permitted.

title: Information classification
text: Information should be classified in terms of legal requirements, value, criticality and sensitivity to unauthorized disclosure or modification.

title: Data leakage prevention
text: Appropriate measures should be implemented to prevent data leakage from systems, networks and other devices that process, store or transmit information.
